body_txt: The Comedic Hero is a less-than-competent protagonist who nevertheless succeeds despite his best efforts. He might have dumb luck on his side, or a Hyper-Competent Sidekick might be watching his back with or without his knowledge. Alternatively, he might good at weaponising his eccentricities into his own special brand of competence at just the right time. Numerous heroes from the Golden and Silver Ages of comics were presented as bumbling fools whose only true weapon against crime is incredible luck. The Fool is a specific variant of this character type. Might be a Crouching Moron, Hidden Badass . For the superhero version, see Super Zeroes . For a goof who is more competent than people would like to admit see Let's Get Dangerous! . A Heroic Comedic Sociopath is this with Comedic Sociopathy . See also Idiot Hero . For its villainous or antagonistic variety, see Laughably Evil .
